## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content production, workflow improvements, and future strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content delivery delays due to team illness; flexibility offered for deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Improved workflow for podcast content creation, including sharing of transcripts and pod weeklies](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Plans to establish a repeatable process for podcast content distribution by end of January](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Focus on developing thematic CTAs and content kits to enhance engagement and perceived value](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Updates

  - [Nika (team member) is seriously ill, causing delays in article delivery](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Articles with feedback are still being worked on](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [New deadline: definitely by Friday, possibly by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Team will be off for the next two weeks, returning on January 6th](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Podcast Content Workflow Improvements

  - [Vivek requested full transcripts for podcast articles](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Conor shared access to folders containing:](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [Productionized transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [Chain of thought transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [Pod weeklies (episode titles, descriptions, show notes, clips)](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [New process: Share pod weeklies and transcripts to provide more context for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### Content Strategy and Distribution

  - [Goal: Establish repeatable podcast content process by end of January](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Potential cross-leveraging of content as a newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Aim for minimal input from Conor, maximizing team autonomy](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Distribution channels: podcast, YouTube clips, blog posts, social media, video](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

### CTAs and Engagement Strategy

  - [Developing thematic CTAs by February](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Creating e-books on topics like LMS, AI agents, and AI evaluations](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Plan to map articles to appropriate CTAs (sales or thematic)](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Focus on continuing engagement and education over direct conversion](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Content Kits and Perceived Value

  - [Suggestion to explore content kits for higher perceived value](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Kits can include various assets (e-books, webinars, podcasts, blogs)](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Flexible for different themes and campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Reference: HubSpot's approach to content kits](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### SEO and Traffic Growth

  - [Recent domain transition completed](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Expecting uptick in traffic in Q1 due to:](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Articles being live longer](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [More articles published](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Improved technical SEO](https://fathom.video/share/yA4CczTsY3TY23932o_h6CmqFQnbt2Zz?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
